failure_modes.contrast: Same words in H1/main/event row are material

failure_modes.fp: Rejecting an index because it has one current result
One certame with many attachments treated as list
failure_modes.contrast: Repeated independent certames or shell controls prove index

failure_modes.fp: Article with dates, vacancies and edital link treated as index
Search evidence says multiple editais but they are licitações/nomeações
failure_modes.action: verify actual rendered content and bucket; grounding never certifies

failure_modes.fp: Slug/request belongs to target but final content belongs elsewhere
failure_modes.action: identity uses final URL and content

failure_modes.fp: Official-looking third-party portal accepted by branding
Years navigation treated as stable listing
failure_modes.action: revisar unless underlying aggregated list is proved

failure_modes.fp: Valid category with zero current events treated as missing
Valid browser DOM replaced by checkpoint/static shell
failure_modes.action: freeze and reuse EvidenceSnapshot; never refetch at finalization

failure_modes.fp: Rejecting raw IP/hash/unusual query because it looks unstable
failure_modes.action: judge official chain and function; provider shape is only discovery context

failure_modes.fp: Secretaria de Cultura or menu Soberanas contaminates valid index
failure_modes.action: apply cultural semantics only to title/H1/main/event row with provenance
